overview.description: The Innovator U.S. Small Cap Power Buffer ETF - April (KAPR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the Russell 2000 over a specific holdings period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. KAPR was launched on Apr 1, 2020 and is issued by Innovator.
